items.titolo: The internet was born this week in 1969, and immediately glitched — only two of the five letters in the first computer-to-computer message were received
items.descrizione: The foundations of internet communications were set 56 years ago, when 'LO' was transmitted from UCLA to SRI on the ARPANET.

items.titolo: Researchers create superconducting germanium semiconductor material using standard chip-making techniques - prototype demonstrates millions of superconducting junctions on a 2-inch wafer
